title: age-group — published macros
description: No Blueprint schema macros. The age-group module does NOT publish schema-level composition helpers — Team (Wave 2b) adds age_group_id via its own explicit column declaration. No runtime macros either: age groups are not a request-scoped context axis, so there is no `Request::activeAgeGroup()` equivalent. Downstream consumers reach the catalog via the `HasAgeGroupCatalog` trait on Tenant OR the injected `AgeGroupRepository` / `AgeGroupResolver` service.
